title: Rochester Hills Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Rochester Hills with a Z-Score of -3.26. This event has been categorized as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Rochester Hills are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure and daily life. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.4 GG, indicating a substantial need for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 45% and the wind speed is moderate at 7.9 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
